sections.paragraph:
f. (from the root רוּעַ)-

(1) prop. tumult, loud noise, specially-(a) joyful noise, rejoicing, Job 8:21. הֵרִיעַ תְּרוּעָה 1Sa 4:5 Ezr 3:11, 13 Ezr 3:13, תְּרוּעַת מֶלֶךְ joyful acclamations with which the people receive the king, Num 23:21.-(b) a warlike cry, cry for battle, Amo 1:14 Jer 4:19 49:2 , תְּרועָה הֵרִיעַ to raise a war-cry, Jos 6:5, 20 Jos 6:20.

(2) the sound of a trumpet, Lev 25:9. יֹום תְּרוּעָה the first of the seventh month (afterwards the first), which was announced with sound of trumpet, Lev 23:24 -Num 29:16. זִבְחֵי תְרוּעָה sacrifices offered with sound of trumpet, Psa 27:6, compare Num 10:10 Psa 89:16.
